subject: Fix minor sonar issues
commit_message:
Fix minor sonar issues

Fix minor issues reported by sonar. undo the prev changes because the
build keep failing and not sure why.

Issue-ID: POLICY-1251
Change-Id: I851a04136e6c4eba0e641d20e006b605bae69d56
Signed-off-by: kris.jinka <kris.jinka@samsung.com>

Hi Liam, I tried in my local workspace., even without my commit, the tests in plugins plugins-event-carrier-restrequestor project are failing. Hence I cannot be sure, what is reason., 
it seems apex/state/events api failing for Post, get, delete, put.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2

(3 comments)

Hi Kris,

I'm afraid we'll have to abandon this change because if we bring it in, no Apex policies will run.

I'm sorry I have not overridden these issues in Sonar because it has wasted your time.

By the way, did a test of this change ever run on your local machine? It should not have.

Liam

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-2

Sorry I meant to -2 this not +2

Regarding the build issue, I wonder could you clone a clean copy of the repo and try to build it. A clean checkout is building fine for me.

Abandoned

Thank you Liam, for your comments, i abondon this change, because of its side effects.
